title: Derived claim without source adversarial fixture

signal.digest: This schema-valid research block marks a boundary as derived without identifying any derivation source and must fail provenance validation.
signal.falsifies_if: The semantic validator accepts a derived status with no source.

premise.content: Derived provenance must identify what it was derived from.

claim.content: A derived label alone does not establish provenance.

must_not: A provenance label substitutes for provenance evidence
